inputs.label: Sample Mean (x̄)
inputs.businessContext: The arithmetic average of your sample observations.

businessContext_i18n.en: The arithmetic average of your sample observations.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La moyenne arithmétique de vos observations d'échantillon.
businessContext_i18n.es: Promedio aritmético de las observaciones de su muestra.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation (σ or s)
inputs.businessContext: Population or sample standard deviation, measuring data dispersion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Population or sample standard deviation, measuring data dispersion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Veri dağılımını ölçen anakütle veya örneklem standart sapması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardabweichung der Grundgesamtheit oder Stichprobe, misst die Streuung der Daten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart type de la population ou de l'échantillon, mesurant la dispersion des données.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar poblacional o muestral, que mide la dispersión de los datos.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of independent observations in the sample.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of independent observations in the sample.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der unabhängigen Beobachtungen in der Stichprobe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de observaciones independientes en la muestra.

inputs.label: Critical Value (z or t)
inputs.businessContext: Z-score or t-score corresponding to the desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95% confidence).

businessContext_i18n.en: Z-score or t-score corresponding to the desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95% confidence).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen güven düzeyine karşılık gelen Z-skoru veya t-skoru (ör. %95 güven için 1,96).
businessContext_i18n.de: Z-Wert oder t-Wert entsprechend dem gewünschten Konfidenzniveau (z. B. 1,96 für 95 % Konfidenz).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score z ou t correspondant au niveau de confiance souhaité (ex. 1,96 pour 95 % de confiance).
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación z o t correspondiente al nivel de confianza deseado (ej., 1.96 para 95% de confianza).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
